name: Rocket Ship Launch Space
desc: The ultimate symbol for space exploration and startups 'taking off.' Perfect for aerospace news, mission launches, and rapid growth metaphors.

name: Astronaut Explorer Space
desc: Represents human spaceflight and discovery. High SEO value for NASA updates, science education, and career-in-science content.

name: Ringed Planet Saturn Space
desc: The most recognizable icon for deep space and planetary science. Ideal for astronomy blogs, astrology, and sci-fi aesthetics.

name: Flying Saucer UFO Space
desc: Represents extraterrestrial life and unidentified phenomena. Great for science fiction fans, pop culture, and mystery-themed content.

name: Comet Falling Star Space
desc: Symbolizes cosmic events and celestial movement. Used for astronomical sightings, 'wishing on a star,' and impact theory topics.

name: Telescope Stargazing Space
desc: The primary tool for observing the universe. Targeted at amateur astronomers, observatory news, and distant galaxy research.

name: Milky Way Galaxy Space
desc: Captures the vastness of the night sky. Essential for night photography, philosophical posts about the universe, and cosmic travel.

name: Orbital Satellite Technology Space
desc: Represents man-made objects in orbit. Ideal for global connectivity discussions, GPS technology, and Earth observation data.

name: Full Moon Lunar Space
desc: The primary symbol for the Earth's natural satellite. Used for moon phase updates, night-time activities, and lunar landing history.

name: Alien Pixel Monster Space
desc: A retro-style representation of life in the cosmos. Perfect for gaming content, 8-bit art, and playful extraterrestrial topics.

name: Sun Solar Star Space
desc: The center of our solar system. Used for solar weather updates, heliophysics, and the fundamental source of light in our cosmos.

name: New Moon Eclipse Space
desc: Represents the dark side of the moon or an eclipse event. High value for celestial event calendars and astronomical cycles.
